content: Just published our latest findings on Arctic ice core data. The rate of change in the last decade is unprecedented in our 800K-year record. Thread below.
Hot take: Most AI startups are solving problems that don't exist. The real opportunity is in making existing workflows 10x faster, not building chatbots.
The hospitality industry is about to be disrupted by AI concierges. But here's why the human touch will always win for luxury experiences.
Tried the new design system everyone's talking about. Looks beautiful but the accessibility score is terrible. When will we stop trading usability for aesthetics?
My students just built their first neural network using only spreadsheets. The joy on their faces when it classified handwritten digits was priceless.
